models.source_notes: Trained via deepracer-for-cloud. Archive contains model_49.pb (TF protobuf) + model_metadata.json. 5 discrete actions (steering -30/-15/0/15/30 at speed 0.6). Network: DEEP_CONVOLUTIONAL_NETWORK_SHALLOW. Algo: clipped_ppo.
models.notes: Model binary (model_49.pb) not committed to git -- place the .gz contents in models/external/drfc-clipped-ppo/

models.source_notes: Continuous action space model. Steering -30 to 30, speed 1.25 to 2.8. Greyscale preprocessing. Network: DEEP_CONVOLUTIONAL_NETWORK_SHALLOW. Algo: clipped_ppo.
models.notes: Key differences from drfc-ppo: continuous action space (not discrete), greyscale preprocess, higher speed range (1.25-2.8 vs 0.6). Archive: CenterAlignModel-model.tar.gz

models.source_notes: WSU DeepRacer 2024 competition model. Discrete action space, clipped PPO, front-facing camera. Published by SDC Lab at Western Sydney University.
models.author: SDC Lab, Western Sydney University
models.notes: WSU 2024 competition entry. Repo has 3 models: BillyArthur22079033-PPO-v2-4, Fatemeh-WSU-06-clone-clone, Final-Traveller-PPO-2. Using Final-Traveller as the baseline.

models.source_notes: Public physical-track DeepRacer model from SDC Lab. Discrete action space, clipped PPO, greyscale front-facing camera input. Action space includes steering angles -30/-15/0/15/30 with speeds 1.4/1.6/1.8.
models.author: SDC Lab, Western Sydney University
models.notes: Imported from SDC-Lab/DeepRacer-Models. Archive contains agent/model.pb plus model_metadata.json. Good Saturday candidate as a third AWS-native physical-track comparison model.

models.source_notes: Gold standard for physical DeepRacer racing. Progress/velocity reward, Ackermann steering geometry, stabilizing angles (2.5/5.0 deg), environment randomization, bidirectional training. 9.335s best lap at re:Invent 2024 Forever Raceway.
models.author: Lars Lorentz Ludvigsen
models.notes: Not yet trained -- this entry documents the target configuration. Must be trained via deepracer-for-cloud with Ackermann patch. See models/external/lars-physical-ppo/README.md for full training guide.

models.source_notes: Custom-built exploration model. Uses monocular depth (MiDaS ONNX) for obstacle avoidance, ORB features for visual odometry and place recognition, breadcrumb trail for return-to-home. No track, no QR codes, no LIDAR -- camera only. Supports optional USB stereo camera.
models.author: Laney Lab
models.notes: Phase 1 MVP: obstacle avoidance + breadcrumb return-to-home. See docs/visual-explorer-design.md for full architecture. Code in services/vehicle-runtime/vehicle_runtime/explorer/.
